LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CITIZENS CLIMATE LOBBY AND OUR CHILDREN'S MOTION TO CORRECT THE ADMINSTRATIVE RECORD IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 6, 2012 AT 1PM TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH THE PETITION. WHILE THE COURT RECEIVED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS, THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302 AT LEAST ONE MONTH PRIOR TO THE HEARING WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE HEARING DATE.
